scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const bun = spawnSync('bun', ['--version'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (!bun.error && bun.status === 0) { process.stdout.write(bun.stdout); process.exit(0); } const node = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--version'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (!node.error && node.status === 0) { process.stdout.write(node.stdout); process.exit(0); } console.log('Warning: Neither Bun nor Node.js found. Please install Bun from https://bun.sh');"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); let tscPath; try { tscPath = require.resolve('typescript/bin/tsc'); } catch { console.log('TypeScript check skipped (tsc not available)'); process.exit(0); } const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [tscPath, '--noEmit'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.error && result.error.code === 'ENOENT') { console.log('TypeScript check skipped (tsc not available)'); process.exit(0); } process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
